page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c9i.48xlarge is a compute-optimized virtual server instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features an x86_64 architecture with 192 dedicated physical cores and 192 vCPUs, operating at a clock speed of 3.2 GHz. The system is equipped with an Intel Xeon 6982P-C processor, delivering a 1:1 ratio of threads to physical cores, which ensures dedicated compute resources without hyperthreading overhead.

The instance is configured with 384.0 GB of system memory, providing a resource density of 2.0 GB of RAM per core. This allocation is tailored for compute-heavy workloads that do not require massive memory footprints. Local storage is not bundled with this instance, meaning all storage requirements must be met via external network-attached block storage. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 64 Gbps, facilitating high-throughput data transfers.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the dedicated CPU allocation and high core density offer predictable performance for parallel processing tasks, minimizing resource contention. The lack of bundled local storage and GPUs makes this instance a specialized choice for pure CPU-bound workloads. Suitable applications include high-performance computing, batch processing, intensive web serving, and large-scale compilation tasks.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c9i.48xlarge is a compute-optimized virtual server instance designed for high-density processing tasks. Running on the KVM hypervisor, it features 192 dedicated vCPUs and 192 physical cores powered by an Intel Xeon 6982P-C processor at 3.2 GHz. With a 1:1 thread-to-core ratio, it eliminates hyperthreading overhead to deliver predictable compute performance. The instance is equipped with 384.0 GB of RAM, representing a 2.0 GB per core ratio, and lacks local storage, requiring external network storage solutions. It provides a baseline network bandwidth of 64 Gbps. This hardware profile is optimized for compute-intensive workloads such as high-performance computing, large-scale batch processing, and parallelized CPU tasks where dedicated resource allocation is critical.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c9i.48xlarge is a compute-optimized server featuring 192 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs, 384.0 GB of RAM, and 64 Gbps network bandwidth, designed for high-performance parallel workloads.

tagline: A high-density compute instance featuring dedicated physical cores and high-speed networking for parallelized, CPU-bound enterprise workloads.

384.0 GB of system memory providing 2.0 GB of RAM per core
